---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Run command '...'
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Actual behavior**
What actually happened instead.

**Screenshots / Logs**
If applicable, add screenshots or error logs to help explain your problem.

**Please redact any secrets (API keys, tokens, personal data) from logs before posting.**

**Environment (please complete the following information):**
 - OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11]
 - Node.js version: [e.g. 22.3.0, run `node -v`]
 - Browser (if UI issue): [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 119]
 - FFmpeg version (if render issue): [e.g. 6.0, run `ffmpeg -version`]
 - Hermes Board version: [e.g. main branch @ abc1234, or release v0.3.0]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., does it happen every time? only with specific inputs? after a recent update?).

**Checklist**
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to make sure this is not a duplicate.
- [ ] I have redacted any secrets or personal data from logs/screenshots.
- [ ] I have included steps to reproduce the issue.
- [ ] I have included my environment details (OS, Node.js version, etc.).
